class.name: FileListener
class.brief_description: A class that provides callback methods for handling events of files and directories that are being watched.
class.description: Used to wrap [Callable] as callback methods, which are used to customize filtering rules or handle file actions. [b]Note:[/b] These callbacks will be called in a separate thread, so please ensure thread safety.

method.name: set_event_filter
set_file_action_handler
set_missing_file_actions_handler
method.description: Sets the [Callable] to handle the behavior when file actions are lost due to the file system monitoring queue overflows. [param handler] needs to accept the following arguments in order: [code skip-lint]int[/code]: The watch ID of the directory manually added by [method FileWatcher.add_watch]; [code skip-lint]String[/code]: The path of the watched directory. [b]Note:[/b] This callback will be called in a separate thread, so please ensure thread safety.

constants.constant: A file or directory is created or moved in from outside the scope.
A file or directory is deleted or moved out of scope.
A file or directory is modified.
A file or directory is moved.
Whether it is a directory or points to a valid directory.
